name: Authentication
description: Clerk auth with Google/Microsoft OAuth, magic link, user management

name: Multi-tenant workspace
description: Neon PostgreSQL, RLS, workspace creation, tenant isolation

name: Core data model
description: Company, Contact, Deal, Activity entities with JSONB properties, Drizzle ORM

name: Chat interface
description: Streaming chat with AI SDK, persistent threads, chat history sidebar

name: Settings and onboarding
description: Workspace settings, user profile, onboarding flow, ICP configuration

name: Email sync
description: Google/Microsoft OAuth email sync, backsync, auto-capture inbound/outbound

name: Calendar sync
description: Meeting auto-detection from calendar, participant extraction

name: Activity timeline
description: Unified timeline per contact/company/deal showing all interactions

name: Auto-summarization
description: AI summarization of email threads and meetings with key points extraction

name: Embedding + RAG pipeline
description: Embed all interactions with text-embedding-3-small, pgvector storage, retrieval

name: NL queries with citations
description: Answer questions about business with citations to original conversations

name: CSV import
description: Import contacts/companies/deals from CSV with field mapping

name: Company enrichment
description: Firmographics, industry, size, tech stack from data providers

name: Contact enrichment
description: Title, email, LinkedIn, phone from data providers

name: TAM builder
description: Auto-build TAM from ICP description using data providers + AI

name: ML scoring
description: Account/contact scoring with explanations using enrichment + signals

name: Signal overlay
description: Job postings, funding, tech changes, website visits as scoring signals

name: AI semantic search
description: NL queries over TAM: 'crypto companies hiring RAG engineers'

name: Sequence builder
description: Multi-step email sequences with delays, conditions, templates

name: AI email writer
description: Generate personalized emails from enrichment + signals + memory

name: Autopilot enrollment
description: AI decides who to enroll in sequences, when, and with what messaging

name: Email sending infrastructure
description: SES integration, mailbox rotation, warm-up tracking, SPF/DKIM/DMARC

name: Reply detection
description: Detect replies and auto-stop sequence, classify positive/negative/OOO

name: Deal management
description: Kanban + list views, create/edit deals, drag-drop stages

name: Signal-based stage progression
description: Auto-progress deals based on email activity, meeting count, stakeholder engagement

name: Risk detection
description: Flag ghosting, stalls, competitor mentions with reasons

name: Auto-generated deal summaries
description: AI-written deal overview from all captured interactions

name: CRO Copilot
description: Chat-based deal coaching with specific actionable feedback

name: Prioritized actions
description: AI suggests most important actions to close more revenue

name: Deliverability monitoring
description: Health score, bounce/spam/open/reply rates, warnings, dedicated page

name: Pipeline analytics
description: KPI cards (value, win rate, avg deal, velocity), value-by-stage bars, risk summary

name: Proactive insights
description: Rule-based trend/alert/opportunity detection from pipeline data

name: Background job system
description: BullMQ on Redis for async jobs: enrichment, email, sequences

name: Daily Dashboard
description: Good morning greeting + weekly summary + prioritized task cards with stall detection + today's calendar + inline email with AI-drafted follow-ups

name: Per-signal reasoning with citations
description: Click any signal value → popover with Reasoning tab (AI explanation) + Sources tab (URLs with favicons)

name: Sequence approve/reject flow
description: Start button + thumbs-down reject for AI-proposed sequences. Header shows sender-to-recipient context

name: Email composer side panel
description: Side panel with To/From/Subject/Body fields + Send button. Pre-filled from AI draft

name: Stall detection + AI nudges
description: Stalled N days badge on dashboard tasks + AI-drafted follow-up email inline

name: Score visualization (heat + grades)
description: Letter grade A-F + fire emoji + Burning/Warm/Cold heat indicator on account scores

name: Pipeline column totals
description: Kanban column headers show stage name + deal count badge + total dollar value

name: Account-scoped chat
description: On account/deal detail pages, chat context automatically scoped to current record

name: Chat transparency indicators
description: Ran code / Retrieved CRM data / Analyzed data labels showing what the AI did

name: Suggested chat prompts
description: 8 pre-built prompts on empty chat state for discoverability

name: Contact auto-suggestion
description: Expand account row to see auto-discovered contacts with names, titles, Suggested status

name: Auto-generated follow-up emails
description: After meetings/interactions, auto-generate follow-up email with extracted action items

name: Deal timeline from interactions
description: Auto-generated timeline with dated entries from emails, meetings, activities on deal detail

name: Structured data extraction
description: Extract budget, team size, competitor tools from meeting notes into structured deal fields

name: Multi-language chat support
description: French/Spanish/etc queries get responses in the same language

name: Suggested replies to incoming emails
description: AI pre-drafts replies to incoming emails, user edits and sends via composer

name: 7 account lifecycle stages
description: New, Prospecting, Opportunity, Customer, Disqualified, Inbound, Nurture stages with color-coded pills

name: Momentum indicator on deals
description: Lightning bolt icon on deals with high recent activity in kanban view

name: Custom boolean signal columns
description: Configurable Yes/No columns like Common Investor, Sales-led growth, YC Company

name: Chat history persistence
description: Previous chat threads saved in sidebar, browsable and resumable

name: Mail pre-connection configuration
description: Backsync range (1-24mo), visibility (metadata/full), do-not-track domains, auto-creation mode (disabled/selective/always) configured BEFORE OAuth flow

name: Custom fields / Data model
description: Data model settings page: create custom fields per entity, field types (Text, Date, Single/Multi select, URL, Social handle, Address, Markdown), AI fill mode per field (Auto/Suggest/Off)

name: Company logos in tables
description: Fetch and display company logos (~24px rounded square) next to account names in tables via Clearbit Logo API or similar

name: Persistent chat across all pages
description: Chat input bar visible at bottom of ALL pages (accounts, contacts, opportunities, sequences, etc.), not just dashboard and chat page

name: Score visualization upgrade
description: Replace numeric scores with letter grades (A-F) + fire emoji + heat label (Burning/Warm/Cool/Cold). Map: 90+→A, 75+→B, 60+→C, below→D

name: Dashboard weekly summary with real metrics
description: Replace 'No activity' empty state with real weekly metrics: sequences launched, responses received, meetings held, opportunities created/closed

name: Individual signal columns with reasoning
description: Show detected signals as individual Yes/No columns in accounts table (not count badge). Each Yes opens reasoning popover with Reasoning + Sources tabs

name: Microsoft OAuth email sync
description: Add Microsoft Graph API integration for Outlook/Office 365 email and calendar sync alongside existing Gmail

name: Stage descriptions for AI auto-progression
description: Add description field to opportunity stages that AI reads for auto-progression decisions. AI fill mode (Auto/Suggest/Off) per stage. Optional custom AI prompt

name: Slide-over detail panels
description: Click row in list → 400px slide-over panel from right with entity details, properties, related records. Close/expand buttons. Lightfield pattern

name: Meeting recording + AI notes
description: Integrate meeting recording (Recall.ai or similar), split view: video left 60% + AI notes right 40%. Real-time transcription, summary, key points, structured extraction

name: Notification 3-channel system
description: 6 notification types × 3 channels (Slack/Email/In-app) with per-type toggles and timing config for task reminders

name: Domain exclusion for own company
description: Workspace setting: list of domains associated with own company. Prevent auto-creation of accounts for these domains

name: Schema-less field definitions system
description: New custom_field_definitions table + pipeline_stage_definitions table. CRUD settings UI for custom fields per entity (account/contact/deal) with field types (text, date, single_select, multi_select, url, social, address, markdown), AI fill modes (auto/suggest/off), editable-by. Migrate deal_stage enum to configurable stages.

name: Dynamic entity rendering from field definitions
description: Refactor entity tables (accounts, contacts, deals) to dynamically render columns from custom_field_definitions + JSONB properties. Include custom fields in filter/sort. Render in detail panels and slide-overs.

name: AI field auto-fill from conversations
description: AI reads custom_field_definitions with aiFillMode. For 'auto' fields: populate from conversation/enrichment data automatically. For 'suggest' fields: propose values for user confirmation. Per-field AI integration.

name: Customer memory quality + recall testing
description: Measure recall accuracy with 20+ test queries against known data. Fix embedding coverage gaps. Add pgvector index. Verify citation links resolve. Test cross-entity and date-range queries. Target: 90%+ recall on known data.

name: Auto-generate account summaries from conversations
description: After email sync, aggregate conversation data per account. AI generates 'Account summary' and 'About their business' fields. Store as system-managed custom fields with AI fill: auto.

name: Auto-create accounts from email domains
description: During email sync, if a new external domain is detected (not in company domain exclusion list), auto-create a company record. Enrich it. Link contacts. Makes conversations a first-class data source.

name: Agent action tools: createTask, updateDealStage, sendEmail, bulk ops
description: Add missing AI tools to chat: createTask (link to entity), updateDealStage (move deal), sendEmail (via connected mailbox with approval), bulkUpdateDeals, bulkDraftEmails. Wire human-in-the-loop approval for destructive actions.

name: Calendar sync + meeting detection
description: Build F2.2: Google Calendar sync via OAuth. Detect meetings with external participants. Create activity records. Extract participant info. Foundation for meeting intelligence.

name: Transcript processing + meeting prep + follow-up generation
description: Minimum viable call intelligence without recording: (1) paste/upload transcript → AI extracts summary, key points, action items, structured data (budget, team size, tools). (2) Meeting prep from account data + history. (3) Post-meeting follow-up email generation from transcript.

name: Configurable opportunity stages with AI descriptions
description: Replace hardcoded deal_stage enum with pipeline_stage_definitions table. Settings UI: add/remove/reorder stages, write descriptions that AI reads for auto-progression, AI fill mode per stage, optional custom AI prompt. In Progress vs Done categories.
